title: Expand deterministic L0 discovery advisor evidence corpus
objective: Expand the deterministic L0 discovery advisor evidence corpus so GAP-0001 can be measured against the PLAN-20260707-0003 threshold gates.
proposed_change: Add deterministic evidence-corpus manifest fixtures and regenerate evidence/threshold review outputs. This remains evidence-only and does not enable automatic include_l0.
rationale: PLAN-20260707-0003 concluded the current corpus is not_ready.
The current evidence has too few manifests, too few valid advisor-bearing manifests, and too few unique suggested chunks.
The next safe governed slice is deterministic evidence expansion, not automatic include_l0.
constraints: Proposal only: no implementation is admitted by this PLAN record.
No vector index or document index mutation.
No token-budget enforcement or token-budget telemetry.
Review only: read existing evidence and define thresholds; do not alter runtime behavior.
Any threshold-review implementation requires separate admission by WARRANT before governed improvement work begins.
success_criteria: Evidence corpus contains at least 12 deterministic manifests.
At least 8 manifests contain valid advisor diagnostics.
At least 12 unique suggested L0 chunks are demonstrated.
No automatic include_l0 or runtime side effects are introduced.
risk: Thresholds may be mistaken for approval of automatic inclusion unless the plan keeps threshold definition separate from selection, prompt construction, retrieval, embeddings, indexes, memory stores, token-budget systems, reranking, and adapters.
next_action: If admitted, implement deterministic corpus expansion and rerun evidence/threshold review generation.
summary: Expand deterministic L0 discovery advisor evidence so GAP-0001 can be measured against the PLAN-20260707-0003 threshold gates. This remains evidence-only and does not enable automatic include_l0.
non_goals: Do not add live retrieval, embeddings, index mutation, memory mutation, reranking, token-budget enforcement, or adapter behavior.
Do not close GAP-0001 in this slice.
scope: Evidence corpus expansion only. No runtime selection, prompt, retrieval, embedding, index, memory, reranking, adapter, or token-budget behavior changes.
admission_summary: Admitted for deterministic evidence corpus expansion only; no automatic include_l0 or runtime behavior changes are approved.
completion_summary: Completed deterministic evidence corpus expansion. Threshold gates now pass, while GAP-0001 remains open and automatic include_l0 remains unimplemented.
